name: Agent Pack: SoftDev, IdeaForge & QA
description: Installs 49 production-ready AI agents into OpenClaw: SoftDev (Engineering Manager + 12 specialist subagents), IdeaForge (Venture Builder + 9 specialist subagents), and QA (2 supervisors + 24 specialist subagents). Duplicate-safe — skips agents and files that already exist.
